inputs.label: Winning Probability (p)
inputs.businessContext: Probability that the bet wins (between 0 and 1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability that the bet wins (between 0 and 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass die Wette gewinnt (zwischen 0 und 1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité que le pari gagne (entre 0 et 1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de que la apuesta gane (entre 0 y 1).

inputs.label: Net Odds (b)
inputs.businessContext: Net odds received per unit bet; if you bet 1 and win, you get back your stake plus b (i.e., total return = 1 + b).

businessContext_i18n.en: Net odds received per unit bet; if you bet 1 and win, you get back your stake plus b (i.e., total return = 1 + b).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim bahis başına alınan net oran; 1 bahis yapıp kazanırsanız, bahisinizi artı b alırsınız (yani toplam getiri = 1 + b).
businessContext_i18n.de: Nettoquote pro eingesetzter Einheit; bei Einsatz von 1 und Gewinn erhalten Sie Ihren Einsatz plus b zurück (Gesamtrückzahlung = 1 + b).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cotes nettes reçues par unité mise ; si vous misez 1 et gagnez, vous récupérez votre mise plus b (c'est-à-dire le retour total = 1 + b).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuota neta recibida por unidad apostada; si apuesta 1 y gana, recupera su apuesta más b (es decir, retorno total = 1 + b).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Capital total disponible pour les paris.

inputs.label: Kelly Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier on the full Kelly bet size (1 = full Kelly, 0.5 = half Kelly, etc.).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier on the full Kelly bet size (1 = full Kelly, 0.5 = half Kelly, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam Kelly bahis büyüklüğü üzerindeki çarpan (1 = tam Kelly, 0,5 = yarım Kelly, vb.).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für den vollen Kelly-Einsatz (1 = volles Kelly, 0,5 = halbes Kelly usw.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de la taille de mise Kelly complète (1 = Kelly complet, 0,5 = demi-Kelly, etc.).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador del tamaño de apuesta Kelly completo (1 = Kelly completo, 0.5 = medio Kelly, etc.).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
